summary: Discovery call — discussed agent infrastructure needs and team size
details: Sarah's team of 12 engineers is building internal tools. They need a way to orchestrate agents across their platform. Current pain: manual prompt management and no observability. Budget approved for Q2.

summary: Sent proposal for agent infrastructure buildout
details: Attached SOW with three phases: assessment (2 weeks), pilot (4 weeks), rollout (6 weeks). Total $85K.

summary: Intro call with Marcus — walked through patient portal challenges
details: Legacy .NET system, 15 years old. Needs to support mobile and integrate with Epic EHR. Marcus has board approval but needs a phased approach.

summary: Sent case study and qualification questionnaire
Priya submitted contact form — wants to discuss AI architecture for MVP
details: Pre-seed startup building an AI-native recruiting tool. Looking for fractional CTO-level guidance on architecture decisions.

summary: Platform demo with David — showed MCP server orchestration
details: David was impressed with the bundle lifecycle management. Wants to trial with 3 internal tools. Mentioned Sarah Chen recommended us.

summary: James exploring AI advisory for 4 portfolio companies
details: Clearwater has 12 portfolio companies, 4 are actively exploring AI. James wants a framework deal — we advise all 4 under one agreement.

summary: Sent portfolio advisory proposal to James
Coffee with Lisa at Honolulu tech meetup
details: Lisa runs ops at TalentBridge. 50-person recruiting firm drowning in manual screening. Referred Priya Patel to us.

summary: Negotiation call with Raj — finalizing scope
details: Raj wants a fixed-price engagement. Agreed on 4-week timeline, 3 MCP integrations. Final sign-off pending legal review.

summary: Partnership deep-dive with Nina — bundling voice + agents
details: SynthWave builds voice interfaces. They want to bundle our agent infrastructure as the 'brain' behind their voice products. Revenue share model discussed.

summary: Cold outreach to Roberto about dispatch optimization
details: Meridian runs 800+ trucks. Sent them our logistics case study and a personalized video walkthrough.

summary: Discovery with Emma — AI tutoring for higher ed
details: Bright Horizons has 15K students. Want AI tutors for 3 STEM subjects initially. Budget from a federal innovation grant.

summary: Sophie's deal went cold — compliance team blocked external AI vendors
details: DataCanvas EU internal compliance flagged our US data residency. Deal unlikely to recover without EU hosting.

summary: Mei Lin wants to resell our advisory in APAC
details: Apex has 30 enterprise clients in HK and Singapore. Wants exclusive reseller rights for 12 months. We'd train their team.
